problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
